data.name: Monster Girls: You Can't Say No 🔞
data.detailed_description:
What if desire wasn’t a choice… but a curse?

After a failed ritual goes horribly wrong, an ordinary college student becomes host to a powerful incubus — and with it, a relentless hunger that can’t be ignored.
The only way to survive? Feed it.



Monster Girls: You Can't Say No 🔞 is an adult visual novel blending dating sim, resource management, and interactive gameplay systems.

Welcome to a modern fantasy college where ancient bloodlines, monster girls, and hidden magic exist beneath everyday life. By day — classes and campus life. By night — temptation, manipulation, and dangerous desires.



Flirt, seduce, and build connections with girls from powerful supernatural families. Every interaction fuels your survival.

Because if your “heat” rises too high… it’s game over.

🔥 Key Features


🎮 Playable One-Handed
Designed for smooth, effortless control — perfect for relaxed, immersive sessions where every choice flows naturally 😉
💋 Tons of Spicy Situations
From teasing encounters to bold late-night moments — the game is packed with suggestive, high-tension interactions that keep things constantly exciting.
🧠 Incubus Power System
Upgrade your abilities to unlock new dialogue options, scenes, and easier progression. The stronger your charm, the deeper you can go.
🗺️ Freedom of Choice
Plan your day, explore the campus, pick your targets, and decide how to spend your time. No strict path — only your strategy.
🔥 Desire Management Mechanic
Your “heat” constantly rises — and managing it becomes a core part of gameplay. Ignore it… and face the consequences.

data.short_description: Adult visual novel set in a monster college where desire is survival. Host an incubus, manage rising “heat,” flirt, and build relationships to stay alive. Explore, upgrade abilities, and unlock scenes in a mix of dating sim and resource management. 🔞
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
